subcodes.first_line: O thou who art namesake, companion and co-worker of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Praise be to God that thou dost share in the service of His loved ones and in name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای همنام و همکام و همکار عبدالبهاء حمد خدا را که در خدمت احباء سهیم و در نام
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God
